name: use-latest-version
description: Stop suggesting stale package versions from training data. 15 MCP tools over 39 package registries: latest-version + package-info lookups, semver compare, install-command generation, batch checks, project dependency scanning, outdated reports, conflict detection, compatibility checks, and a scan -> optimize -> validate -> apply upgrade pipeline that edits manifests with dry-run + automatic backups by default. Local-first, no API key required.
